title: EAS build setup — icons, splash, and first TestFlight submission
problem: App Store prep feature is frozen but actual build artifacts don't exist: no app icon (1024×1024), no splash screen asset, no EAS project configuration (eas.json), and no Apple Developer account enrollment. These are blocking items for any real device or TestFlight distribution.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred build work: EAS setup and asset creation were explicitly deferred pending Mac access and Apple Dev account
